Serbia's Novak Djokovic poses with his gold medal after defeating Spain's Carlos Alcaraz during the men's singles tennis final during the 2024 Summer Olympics, August 4, 2024, Paris, France. /CFP

Novak Djokovic beat Carlos Alcaraz on Sunday to claim a maiden Olympic title and become just the fifth player to complete a career Golden Slam.

(With input from AFP)

title: Djokovic beats Alcaraz to win Olympic tennis gold - CGTN
author: CGTN
description: Novak Djokovic beat Carlos Alcaraz on Sunday to claim a maiden Olympic title and become just the fifth player to complete a career Golden Slam.(With input from AFP)
